THREE SUNS

Chaotic Dawn

Day 0 Stability 100% Mode SHIELD Best 0
omens quiet
Click/tap to place gravity anchors
MODE: SHIELD SHIELD: solar aura resistance ↑ cold risk ↑ FOCUS READY

Sun contact is fatal. Modes reduce aura damage only. Click to place anchors. Signal limits anchors. Space / FOCUS = slow time. P = LOW FX.

orbital pause

PAUSED

portal to the next vibe jam game

Sun contact is always fatal — modes reduce nearby aura damage only. Click to place anchors. Space / FOCUS slows time. 1 Shield, 2 Sleep, 3 Observe. M mute. P LOW FX.

civilization report

THE DAWN ENDED

portal to the next vibe jam game

field guide

HOW TO SURVIVE

  • Click or tap to place gravity anchors.
  • Anchors cost Signal. Signal regenerates during stable orbits.
  • Space / FOCUS slows time briefly — use it to escape danger.
  • 1 Shield — protects from solar aura heat. Not from direct contact.
  • 2 Sleep — protects from deep cold and restores Signal faster.
  • 3 Observe — clearer omens and cheaper anchors, but weaker protection.
  • Direct sun contact is fatal. No mode prevents collision.
  • Survive as many days as possible.

Modes reduce aura danger. They do not stop direct sun contact.

portal to the next vibe jam game

origin record

THE LAST ORBIT

In a system where dawn has no pattern, one living world remains.

Three suns rule the sky. Alpha burns like a tyrant. Beta vanishes into cold silence. Gamma bends gravity until truth becomes rumor.

Your civilization no longer asks to be saved forever. It asks for one more day.

Place anchors. Read omens. Slow time. Choose how the world endures.

The universe is not evil. It is only unstable.

The portal leads to the next Vibe Jam world.

portal to the next vibe jam game
